programme.title: Petticoat Junction S05E07
programme.desc: Petticoat Junction S05E07

programme.title: Munsters 112
programme.desc: Munsters 112

programme.title: Addams Family 123
programme.desc: Addams Family 123

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: The Love Boat

programme.title: Daktari
programme.desc: After Hedley warns two hunters to leave the reserve and put out their campfire one of them starts a fire to drive the rhinos they want to hunt off the reserve and onto legal hunting territory The fire soon engulfs the reserve forcing animals to flee and with Jack and Paula observing a buffalo herd in the midst

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Hairdresser Barry styles the hair of the creme de la creme But when his clients wind up blackmailed to pay Barrys loan shark can the Harts help Barry break free before someone else winds up dead

programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: When a captured burglar swears he never uses a gun it sends Cagney and Lacey to figure out how a shooting also occurred at the scene of the crime Dory finally feels its time for Christine to meet his children

programme.title: Starsky 207
programme.desc: Starsky 207

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: Hawke is kidnapped and brainwashed by John Bradfrod Horn an evil tycoon; and its up to Cait to rescue Hawke Dom and Airwolf from his clutches

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki Jack and Ryan become suspicious when they each receive mysterious visits from three friends from their past

programme.title: Rocky and Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Rocky and Bullwinkle

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Bobbie Jo is nominated for a membership in the only sorority in town But in order to be accepted she has to get a date with the schools star athlete Stonewall Jackson whose only interested in sports

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: A handsome young Dr Bailey opens an office at the hotel but Kate is concerned there wont be any patients for him since everyone goes to Dr Stuart

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur and his neighbor Roger are banished to the barn by their wives

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed is stolen and hidden in a sorority house basement Its Wilbur dressed in drag to the rescue

programme.title: Rifleman
programme.desc: Rifleman

programme.desc: Rifleman 509

programme.title: Gunsmoke S09E28 Bentley
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S09E28 Bentley

programme.title: Knight 314
programme.desc: Knight 314

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A model uses a cursed compact to dispose of anyone who stands in the way of her success including her doctor and her lover

programme.title: Dark Night of the Scarecrow
programme.desc: In a small Southern town four vigilantes wrongfully execute a mentally-challenged man but after the court sets them free mysterious accidents begin to kill them off one by one

programme.title: Freddy Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to Dream Come True the new host of Springwood Confidential Dick Gautier doesnt heed Freddy Kruegers warning to ax his latest show topic Dreams That Kill Meanwhile a doctor performs an experimental procedure that results in a patient Christian Bocher acquiring another mans personality -- and dreams

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A conniving con-man posing as a salesman gets more than he bargained for when he comes knocks at the door of the wrong family

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Wealthy and successful middle-aged businessman Leo Burns suspects that his much younger wife Bridget is having an extramarital affair Leo hires sleazy private investigator GG Devoe to find out the identity of Bridgets lover

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: The Parisian underworld clashes with a greedy developer whose plans are not in line with theirs

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: Bogus preacher Brother Charles preys upon the misfortune of attractive young homeless women by leading them toward prostitution under the guise of spreading brotherly love The fake priests scam comes to a sudden halt when mysterious stigmata appear on the hands of his latest flock member Alice Ames as she performs her mission

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric sets out after Janos Skorzeny following the rumors of a Bigfoot sighting After a ferocious battle with a stronger werewolf Eric finds sanctuary in the home with a woman named Mary who has a strange and supernatural secret of her own

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks safe haven in a monastery but the monks there have secrets of their own In the past the werewolf Skorzeny paid a visit to the monastery and turned at least one of the monks

programme.title: Knight 312
programme.desc: Knight 312

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger brings home an inventor-friends homemade lie detector and he hooks it up to Wilbur who later hooks it up to Ed

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan convinces Kommandant Klink that the heavy water being stored at Stalag 13 is a youth potion

programme.title: Hogans Hereos
programme.desc: Using the microphone that Klink has installed in the barracks Hogan tricks Klink into contacting an underground member

programme.title: Mchale 322
programme.desc: Mchale 322

programme.title: Mchale 414
programme.desc: Mchale 414

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After tipping his hat instead of saluting female Captain Iron Pants Martin Gomer is assigned special detail in her office to teach him a lesson But it turns out that he is the teacher instead of the student as he reminds her that she is more then just a Marine

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: A trouble maker transfers into the platoon and decides to make Pyle his patsy Gomer tries to handle it with understanding and kindness - but soon learns that bullies need to be stood up against

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways discover that they are all wanted for questioning in a murder that took place right before they left Hawaii

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A telephone cable washes up on the island after a bad storm The castaways try to use it to call home for help

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and Kate are upset when Luke sells food on credit to a failing restaurant run by a widow and her daughter but the McCoy patriarch softens his no credit stance considerably when he learns that the proprietress is attractive and spunky

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The McCoys are initially honored by a visit from supposedly pro-farmer Congressional candidate Jim Slade but they decide to turn the tables when they learn that he has never been a farmer and is interested mainly in self-aggrandizement

programme.title: Smart 418
programme.desc: Smart 418

programme.title: Smart 516
programme.desc: Smart 516

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: The Hi-Ballers under new leader Riker are relentless in their pursuit of BJ and the Piston Packin Mamas especially after word gets out that BJ Snow White and the lady truckers are hauling truckloads of money for the Treasury Dept

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: After Clint Eastwood moves into the neighborhood Mister Ed sets up a party line with his house which causes nothing but problems for Mr Eastwood

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Gophers friend Phil offers him a job managing his hotel Magician Kens assistant Maggie is upset when he sends his brother Al to replace him in the act Hetty moves into a ships cabin to get closer to porter Charlie

programme.title: WKRP 108
programme.desc: WKRP 108

programme.title: WKRP 107
programme.desc: WKRP 107

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Herman must find another job when hes laid off due to budget cuts

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Wood receives a telegraph to say his cousin Readith who bullied him as a child is returning to Evebing Shade

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Newlywed Gary Cole goes to buy some jewelry for his wife Wendy and disappears When Wendy realizes hes missing nobody that she questions seems to recognize the couple Her hysteria only hampers Dans investigation

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: The Harts look forward to lunch with Jennifers friend Marcie and her new spouse Adam Fowler who vanishes and is soon found dead Meanwhile two men who followed him out of the restaurant trail who they think is his wife Jennifer

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Kirk is jealous when an old flame of Leslies appears with a proposal

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick reluctantly helps an aspiring author make it in the business

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Professor believes the castaways may be beginning to suffer from Island Madness so he convinces Ginger to use her psychic powers to convince them that a boat is coming to rescue them

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitch takes a liking to Nina Cutter a beautiful woman who turns out to be a cat burglar responsible for a series of thefts at the yacht club

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Temporally displaced Confederate Civil War soldiers appear in the swamp one of whom is a previous residence of Wills house Will helps the man to discover the mystery behind his wartime disappearance and make peace with his past so he can pass on

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Dan Mateo one of Alphas botanists believes that he can increase their food supply by communicating telepathically with his plants After passing out during one of his electronic experiments Alpha seems to become haunted by a murderous and disfigured spirit

programme.title: Demons
programme.desc: A group of random people are invited to a screening of a mysterious movie only to find themselves trapped in the theater with ravenous demons

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Daisy loses her job at the Boars Nest for asking for a raise Enos suggests she apply to become a deputy with the Hazzard County Sheriffs Department Boss and acting Sheriff Grady Byrd rig the tests but Daisy passes them all She more than proves her worth when she takes on a pair of experienced bank robbers

programme.title: Hercules 214
programme.desc: Hercules 214

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Padar is a fierce battle game where spectators can connect via a jack patch that Liam suspects is causing neurological damage to users When a Padar warrior dies it raises even more questions about the safety

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Mana forces a dying surgeon to conduct experiments on patients in his hospital attempting to implant alien embryos into human hosts

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arrested for a murder he did not commit Wills situation looks desperate when his attorney turns out to be a crooked prosecutor with ambitions to rise to the senate Can Alec help prove his friends innocence

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A police officer is shot during a routine stop of a car Friday and Gannon find the driver and passenger and learn they are paroled convicts The police officer cannot remember anything about the shooting event to help convict the two men

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: The Fugitive

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: Heath is drawn to an alluring old girlfriend who is now married and part of a trick shooting act When her husband is mysteriously killed in a gun accident Heath is accused of murder Jarrod must use a new science to try to clear him but ends up sparring about it with the DAan old law school colleague who is jealous of the Barkleys

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne on an Army task is chased by the Sioux He wounds a miner so he stays to help the miner and his wife Three men wanted for selling faulty guns to the Sioux arrive with eyes for the wife and the gold although the Sioux threaten

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Rachels ex William Russ a riverboat gunman plans to leave their precocious 9 year old in her care

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Three runaways from Oregon George Jack and Sharon Morgan are squatting in an abandoned house Sharon is very sick but money is very limited George decided to break into a local pharmacy after hours to obtain some medicine

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Rogosh is an operative for a country hostile to the United States When he strikes he typically leaves dozens if not hundreds of bodies in his wake Rogosh has been spotted in Los Angeles But he will not crack under normal interrogation methods Briggs comes up with an unusual plan The IMF stages an accident where pedestrian Rogosh is struck by a car When he awakes he appears to be in a prison in his home country -- three years later

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon try to track down the driver who hit and run with a pedestrian

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Meteor
programme.desc: When USA detects a gigantic meteor moving towards Earth their only hope to save mankind is to use an illegal nuclear weapon satellite However they soon realize that they cannot do it alone

programme.title: Stryker
programme.desc: The worlds water supply has dried up due to some sort of apocalypse A beautiful woman holds the secret to where one of the last springs being guarded by a group of Amazons A Road Warrior like crew captures her and tries to make her talk through brutal torture The hero Styrker unites with some of the remaining good guys and the Amazons and frees the woman

programme.title: Project Metalbeast
programme.desc: In 1974 an unhinged CIA agent injects himself with the werewolf blood he found After a killing spree his body is put in suspended animation then thawed out 20 years later by his crazy boss and a team of unsuspecting doctors

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: Missing in Action 3
programme.desc: Braddock mounts a one-man assault to free his wife and son who are still being held in a Vietnam prison camp

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: In 1944 a German sergeant gets involved in an anti-Hitler conspiracy and saves the life of an American colonel

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Night of the Zombies
programme.desc: Investigators search for soldiers missing bodies and hear unbelievable rumors about zombies Dismissing those rumors they set out to investigate After two men are found dead CIA special-agent Nick Monroe is sent to flush out what are suspected to be deserters from the old US Army Chemical Corps unit Nicks ruthless investigation uncovers a ghoulish plot of world domination but first he must escape the horror that does not want to be known yet!

programme.title: Theater of Blood
programme.desc: A Shakespearean actor takes poetic revenge on the critics who denied him recognition

programme.title: Children of the Corn
programme.desc: Two lovers stumble across a small American town where local children have killed the adult population in a bizarre ritual

programme.title: Psycho II
programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 21 filmed at the Century Casino in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. David Swanson v. Matt Zemlak.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Ryan Connor HK43.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Mike Davis

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Amanda Buckner v. Shayna Baszler

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 46 continues to bring you some of the best fights in MMA! This episode features the exhilarating amateur matchup of Jiu Jitsu athlete Colton Boxell vs. Boxer Mac Laursen. This is followed by the very entertaining pro contest between the ever explosive Vyron Phillips taking on BJJ Black Belt Leo Xavier.

programme.desc: Sherard sits down with Carribbean superstar K Victoria Hear how shes changing the world with her music

programme.desc: Sherard sits down with the man who has turn comedy into an art

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.desc: Join me live on location where I chop it up with comedy icon Mr Mike Marino As well as surprise guest Mr Sean Kanan and more!

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: A cursed knight named Dekion tricks the kids into retrieving a Circle of Power for Venger The Circle can be used for good or evil and its up to Dekion to make that choice

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Bobby is bitten by a poisonous creature and an antidote can only be found at the garden of queen Zinn Will his friends be able to find it in time and convince the queen to give them the cure

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: MAD agents have hidden a bomb in the amusement park in Metro City

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: The beautiful MAD agent Labella is disrupting the peaceful country of Pianostan Inspector Gadget stops her before she causes a revolution Safety Tip Dont eat food that looks old or bad; prevent food poisoning

programme.title: Challenger of the GoBots
programme.desc: Both sides race to locate the ruins of an ancient GoBotic spacecraft which was carrying a powerful weapon when it crashed into the South American jungle long ago

programme.title: Challenger of the GoBots
programme.desc: An intergalactic sports promoter captures Renegades and Guardians and pits them against each other on Gameworld

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Oton leads the Time Creatures from the future on a mission to eliminate the HerculoidsThe Viking-like Raider Apes led by Gotron raid a village looking for gold Zandor comes to the rescue

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Konar is siphoning the atmosphere Zandor follows the wind to find him who brings out the ZorbotsVolton and the Electrode Men fly their spaceship into a volcano where they aim to take over the world

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: In search of a message from Audric Jayce lands on a planet protected by telepathic plants which keep the planet concealed Saw Boss makes a deal with a wicket wizard who has put a sleeping spell on the princess who controls the plants

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: By using a lock of Audrics hair Saw Boss creates a clone which tricks Jayce into a trap Gillian suspects the truth and convinces Jayce to leave the root behind as a precaution Jayce is captured and a clone of Jayce is sent back for the root

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Brand new army planes are disappearing just before they are about to land at McKenna Airfield The owner Dutch McKenna asks his friend Matt Trakker for help

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM uses a reversing machine to rob casinos in Las Vegas Matt calls in the MASK team to stop the heists and return the money
